title: Mason's Manual of Legislative Procedure
doc_html:
Rule 15.3.  Mason's Manual of Legislative Procedure

           On any question of order and parliamentary practice, when these rules are silent or inexplicit, Mason's Manual of Legislative Procedure shall be considered as authority.
doc_text:
Rule 15.3.  Mason's Manual of Legislative Procedure
On any question of order and parliamentary practice, when these rules are silent or
inexplicit, Mason's Manual of Legislative Procedure shall be considered as authority.
